svg.style: background-color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; user-select: none;

g.text: The collective pitch control changes the pitch angle of all main rotor blades simultaneously and equally.
This alters total aerodynamic lift, allowing the helicopter to climb or descend, while affecting drag and torque.
Drag the knob up to increase pitch.
1. Raising collective increases the Angle of Attack.
2. Higher AoA generates more Lift, raising the craft.
3. However, higher AoA also generates more Drag.
4. More drag requires more engine power, creating
a Torque reaction on the fuselage.
